generated_for.experience_summary: A sample operations professional transitioning into analytics with stakeholder communication and process-improvement experience.

projects.title: Customer Support Operations Intelligence
projects.summary: Analyze a realistic support operation to improve service levels, staffing coverage, and customer outcomes.
projects.business_problem: Support leaders need reliable visibility into demand, response time, resolution quality, and staffing pressure so they can allocate coverage and improve customer outcomes.
projects.portfolio_story: Demonstrates end-to-end analytics from business framing and data validation through stakeholder reporting and recommendations.

milestones.label: Validate source relationships
milestones.description: Profile source tables, verify candidate keys, and test required many-to-one relationships before analysis.
milestones.definition_of_done: A saved validation notebook documents duplicates, orphans, and join-cardinality findings.

datasets.name: Support Operations Dataset
datasets.description: Synthetic ticket data representing a multi-channel customer support operation.
datasets.generation_notes: Include realistic demand spikes, missing values, and duplicate ticket rows.

kpis.name: Median resolution time
kpis.definition: Median elapsed hours from ticket creation to resolution for resolved tickets.
kpis.decision_use: Evaluate whether staffing and workflow changes improve typical resolution performance.
